subject.Other Features: 2 septic systems and 1 private water well, 6' Chainlink fence with 3-strand barbed wire top (141 Ft), Rolling Gates (2 @ 22', 1 @ 16'), Pipe + Chainlink Fencing (145 Ft), Concrete Pads (2,907.05 SF), Asphalt Paved Parking (9,380 SF), AC Units (5)
subject.Year Built: =JOIN(", ", UNIQUE(FILTER(ParcelImprovements[Year Built], ParcelImprovements[instrumentNumber] = F2, ParcelImprovements[Is GLA] = TRUE)))
subject.Age:
=IFERROR(
  LET(
    report_year, YEAR(FILTER(ReportInputs[value], ReportInputs[variableName] = "ReportEffectiveDate")),
    oldest_built_year, MIN(SPLIT(BA2, ", ")),
    report_year - oldest_built_year
  )
)
subject.Effective Age: =getEffectiveAge(FILTER(ParcelImprovements[Gross Building Area (SF)], ParcelImprovements[instrumentNumber] = F2, ParcelImprovements[Is GLA] = TRUE), FILTER(ParcelImprovements[Year Built], ParcelImprovements[instrumentNumber] = F2, ParcelImprovements[Is GLA] = TRUE), YEAR(FILTER(ReportInputs[value], ReportInputs[variableName] = "ReportEffectiveDate")), 30)
